description: JustFix is a UK home-repair booking service that connects homeowners, tenants, and landlords with vetted tradespeople for jobs such as plumbing, electrical, glazing, and other maintenance work. Its site also offers an AI-based job cost estimator before booking.
summary: JustFix exposes a known public MCP endpoint at `https://estimator-mcp.justfix.app/mcp`; no public developer REST, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found on `justfix.app`.
